title: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model in a Claude-built CAD editor
summary: Claude Fable 5 created a browser-based CAD editor that includes a built-in AI copilot for 3D model design and generation. The system is capable of designing complete 3D-printable models within the editor interface.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 building a browser-based CAD editor that ships with a built-in AI copilot for 3D model design and generation. It demonstrates the model both creating the tool and using it to design complete 3D-printable models within the editor interface. The takeaway is a single system that handles code generation for the application and the design work inside it, tying CAD design and an AI copilot together in one workflow.
